prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年哈尔滨工业大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约819名→562名→238名→144名→161名，整体呈持续前移趋势，2021至2024年累计前移约675名；20 25年较2024年小幅后移约17名，但仍处于历史高位区间，近两年位次稳定在144–161名之间；该校在海南省招生计划逐年大幅缩减：2021年20人→2022年10人→202 3年7人→2024年3人→2025年2人→2026年2人，2025与2026年计划持平，均为2人。计划持续缩减是位次前移的重要推手，2026年计划未进一步缩减，但绝对数量极低（仅2人） ，竞争仍高度集中。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，C9联盟成员、国防七子之一；软科中国大学排名2021年第11→2022年第13→2023年第 13→2024年第16→2025年第14→2026年第12，近年排名稳居全国前16，2026年回升至第12位，学校综合实力与品牌影响力持续强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中 性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10（高热），视频数15条，综合热度约454万，在国防七子中关注度领先；2024年投档异常信号为中关注，有考生反映投档线暴 跌与招生宣传不足有关，但2025年已趋稳。整体报考关注度处于高位；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共17个学科：机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程 A+、力学A+、控制科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A、土木工程A、仪器科学与技术A、数学A、电气工程A、管理科学与工程A等，工科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等哈工大核心工科专业在2024–2026年均为高热推荐/推荐，社会热度持续走高；海南省考生总数2021 年52977→2022年55945→2023年61728→2024年65969→2025年67408→2026年约78000（普通高考），2026年较2025年增加约15.7%，竞争基数显著扩大；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，与海南省距离较远，属于跨省招生；该校在海南招生占比极低 （仅2人），属于典型的外省高水平大学少量招生模式，地域偏好对报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次161名、2026年招生计划持平（2人）、海南省考生 总数大幅增长约15.7%、学校软科排名回升至第12位、抖音高热关注度、核心工科专业热度持续等因素，预计2026年竞争进一步加剧，位次将前移。预测最低录取位次约146名，波 动区间96–196名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 哈尔滨工业大学在海南省综合类仅投放2个招生计划，均为顶尖培养项目。位次在预测区间96–146名以内可重点冲刺一档未来技术拔尖班；位次在146–196名区间可考虑二档具身 智能（大湾区班）。由于招生名额极少，报考风险较高，建议同时准备同层次其他高校的保底方案。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Harbin Institute of Technology in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 819 → 562 → 238 → 144 → 161, showing a continuous upward trend overall, with a cumulative advancement of about 675 places from 2021 to 2024; in 2025, there was a slight decline of about 17 places compared to 2024, but it remains in a historically high range, with rankings stabilizing between 144 and 161 in the past two years; the university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province has been significantly reduced year by year: 20 in 2021 → 10 in 2022 → 7 in 2023 → 3 in 2024 → 2 in 2025 → 2 in 2026, with the 2025 and 2026 plans being the same, both at 2. The continuous reduction in the plan is a key driver of the ranking advancement; the 2026 plan has not been further reduced, but the absolute number is extremely low (only 2), so competition remains highly concentrated.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, a member of the C9 League, and one of the Seven Sons of National Defense; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026, with recent rankings firmly in the top 16 nationally, rising to 12th in 2026, indicating consistently strong comprehensive strength and brand influence; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; the overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 10th (high heat), with 15 videos and a comprehensive popularity of about 4.54 million, leading in attention among the Seven Sons of National Defense; the abnormal signal for 2024 admissions is medium attention, with some candidates reporting that the sharp drop in admission scores was related to insufficient recruitment promotion, but it has stabilized in 2025. Overall, the application attention is at a high level; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Instrument Science and Technology A, Mathematics A, Electrical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, etc., with top-tier engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at HIT such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended/recommended from 2024 to 2026, with social popularity continuing to rise; the total number of candidates in Hainan Province was 52,977 in 2021 → 55,945 in 2022 → 61,728 in 2023 → 65,969 in 2024 → 67,408 in 2025 → approximately 78,000 in 2026 (regular college entrance examination), with an increase of about 15.7% in 2026 compared to 2025, significantly expanding the competition base; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Hainan Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment proportion in Hainan is extremely low (only 2), typical of a small-scale enrollment model for high-level universities from other provinces, with limited impact of regional preference on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 161, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining unchanged (2), a significant increase of about 15.7% in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province, the university's Soft Science ranking rising to 12th, high Douyin popularity, and sustained popularity of core engineering majors, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, leading to a ranking advancement. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 146, with a fluctuation range of 96–196.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
None (The university only offers 2 enrollment slots in Hainan, both for high-end training programs, with no traditionally low-score majors)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Harbin Institute of Technology only offers 2 enrollment slots in Hainan Province's comprehensive category, both for top-tier training programs. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 96–146 can focus on sprinting for the Tier 1 Future Technology Top Talent Class; those with rankings in the 146–196 range can consider the Tier 2 Embodied Intelligence (Greater Bay Area Class). Due to the extremely limited number of enrollment slots, the application risk is high, so it is recommended to also prepare backup plans from other universities of the same level.
